metadata.title: About Us | Beyond Gluten
metadata.description: Learn about the story of Beyond Gluten and our vision for a gluten-free world. Developed by FutureX Digital Solutions in Jordan.
metadata.keywords: about beyond gluten, beyond gluten team, futurex jordan, gluten free platform about us

openGraph.title: About Us - Beyond Gluten | Our Vision & Mission
openGraph.description: Towards a world where food allergies are not a barrier. Get to know our team and values.

title: About Beyond Gluten
subtitle: Our journey to bring gluten-free joy to everyone

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: At Beyond Gluten, we believe that going gluten-free shouldn't mean compromising on taste. Our mission is to create delicious, high-quality gluten-free products that everyone can enjoy — whether you have celiac disease, gluten sensitivity, or simply choose a gluten-free lifestyle.

story.title: Our Story
story.body: Founded with a passion for baking and a commitment to inclusivity, Beyond Gluten started in a small kitchen with a simple goal: make gluten-free food that tastes as good as the real thing. Today, we continue to innovate and expand our product line, bringing smiles to tables everywhere.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.body: A world where gluten-free living is seamless, delicious, and accessible to everyone everywhere. We envision a future where dietary restrictions never hold anyone back from enjoying life's simple pleasures.

items.title: Quality First
items.description: We never compromise on ingredients or taste. Every product meets our rigorous quality standards before reaching your table.

items.title: Innovation
items.description: We continuously innovate to create products that surprise and delight our customers with new flavors and experiences.

items.title: Community
items.description: We build a supportive community where everyone feels welcome, understood, and empowered in their gluten-free journey.

items.title: Trust
items.description: Transparency and integrity guide everything we do, from sourcing ingredients to packaging and delivery.
